html:
2026-0166
2026-02-26FINExcise Act, 2001Regulations Amending the Excise Duties on Vaping Products Regulations (Nova Scotia)Regulations Amending the Excise Duties on Vaping Products Regulations (Nova Scotia) in order to (1) add Nova Scotia to the list of provinces and territories that are participating in the coordinated vaping product taxation system; and (2) set out transitional rules that specify when the additional vaping product duty for Nova Scotia is applicable.Registration: SOR/2026-0041 Publication Date: 2026-03-11
subject: Regulations Amending the Excise Duties on Vaping Products Regulations (Nova Scotia)
precis: Regulations Amending the Excise Duties on Vaping Products Regulations (Nova Scotia) in order to (1) add Nova Scotia to the list of provinces and territories that are participating in the coordinated vaping product taxation system; and (2) set out transitional rules that specify when the additional vaping product duty for Nova Scotia is applicable.
